bid_claims.quote_text: On July 23, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.
On July 24, 2013, Party B submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $18.00 per share.
Also on July 24, 2013, representatives from Party C called BofA Merrill Lynch and presented an oral preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $15.00 to $17.00 per share.
Later on July 25, 2013, Party C submitted a written indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $16.50 per share.

On September 9, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $19.50 per share, indicating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

On September 9, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share and proposed to finance the transaction with a combination of equity from affiliated funds and third party debt.

On September 10, 2013, Party A submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share, to be financed by outstanding credit facilities or affiliated equity sources.

Also on September 10, 2013, in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch, a representative of Party C indicated that it was submitting a revised oral indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share.

On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share, reiterating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to engage in exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders, representing 10% of the new equity with a strike price equal to Party B's initial cost basis.

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch contacted strategic and financial parties identified at the June 24th Special Committee meeting in accordance with Special Committee directives.
event_claims.quote_text: During the next several weeks, in accordance with the directives of the Special Committee, BofA Merrill Lynch contacted the strategic and financial parties identified at the June 24th Special Committee meeting.

event_claims.description: Party B entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and received an informational package.
event_claims.quote_text: Later on June 28, 2013, Party B, entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and was provided with an informational package for the purpose of providing Party B with data to formulate a preliminary indication of interest.

event_claims.description: Party C entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and received an informational package.
event_claims.quote_text: On June 30, 2013, Party C entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and was provided with an informational package for the purpose of providing Party C with data to formulate a preliminary indication of interest.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and received an informational package.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 11, 2013, CSC/Pamplona entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and were provided with an informational package for the purpose of providing CSC/Pamplona with data to formulate a preliminary indication of interest.

event_claims.description: The Special Committee decided to deny Moab's request to partner exclusively with CSC/Pamplona at that stage of the process.
event_claims.quote_text: the Special Committee decided to deny the exclusivity request at this stage of the process so that the potential equity rollover of Moab's shares could be available as a source of capital for other potential bidders.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 23, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a preliminary indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 24, 2013, Party B submitted a preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $17.00 to $18.00 per share.

event_claims.description: Party C presented an oral preliminary indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on July 24, 2013, representatives from Party C called BofA Merrill Lynch and presented an oral preliminary indication of interest at an all-cash purchase price of $15.00 to $17.00 per share.

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized and instructed BofA Merrill Lynch to reach out to four interested bidders and arrange management meetings.
event_claims.quote_text: After discussion and in an effort to drive offers with increased value, the Special Committee authorized and instructed BofA Merrill Lynch to proceed with the staged disclosure as discussed at this meeting and to reach out to each of the four interested bidders and arrange management meetings.

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch sent letters to Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona requesting revised written proposals by September 9, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 27, 2013, BofA Merrill Lynch, as instructed by the Special Committee, sent a letter to each of Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona instructing such bidders to submit revised written proposals no later than September 9, 2013 if such bidders wished to proceed further in the process to pursue an in-depth evaluation of Mac-Gray with the objective of making a revised offer.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised indication of interest and requested two weeks of exclusive negotiations.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 9, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $19.50 per share, indicating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 9, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share and proposed to finance the transaction with a combination of equity from affiliated funds and third party debt.

event_claims.description: Party A submitted a revised indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 10, 2013, Party A submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share, to be financed by outstanding credit facilities or affiliated equity sources.

event_claims.description: Party C submitted a revised oral indication of interest.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 10, 2013, in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch, a representative of Party C indicated that it was submitting a revised oral indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share.

event_claims.description: BofA Merrill Lynch called Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona requesting final indications of interest by September 18, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: As authorized and instructed by the Special Committee, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch called each of Party A, Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona on September 11, 2013 with such instructions.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a final-round proposal at $20.75 per share in cash and requested two weeks of exclusive negotiations.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share, reiterating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to engage in exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its previous $18.00 to $19.00 per share indication was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised final-round indication of interest valued by Party B at $21.50 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders, representing 10% of the new equity with a strike price equal to Party B's initial cost basis.

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith.

event_claims.description: Pamplona reiterated its commitment to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction.
event_claims.quote_text: Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction

participation_count_claims.quote_text: Over the next two months a total of 20 potential bidders, including two strategic bidders (Party A and CSC/Pamplona) and 18 financial bidders (including Party B and Party C), entered into confidentiality agreements with Mac-Gray on a form provided by Mac-Gray, the terms of which were individually negotiated with potential bidders, but did not vary materially from the form provided.

At this meeting, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch reviewed the preliminary indications of interest received from Party B, Party C and CSC/Pamplona as well as the Party A June 21 proposal, in each case from a financial point of view.

After discussion and in an effort to drive offers with increased value, the Special Committee authorized and instructed BofA Merrill Lynch to proceed with the staged disclosure as discussed at this meeting and to reach out to each of the four interested bidders and arrange management meetings.
Between August 6, 2013 and August 27, 2013, the four bidders conducted business and legal due diligence.
